text.title: cot-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for cot-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Parsing the final answer from free-form CoT text without an answer marker.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Free-form CoT output ends with varying phrases ("Therefore...", "So the answer is...", "In conclusion..."). String parsing against these is brittle and fails as prompt wording changes.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Temperature 0 produces the same deterministic response on every call. All N samples are identical; voting returns the same answer with false confidence of 1.0.

failure-mode.description: Including few-shot examples that contain errors in intermediate steps.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs imitate the style and reasoning patterns of examples. An example that makes an arithmetic error in step 2 but arrives at the correct answer teaches the wrong reasoning path.

failure-mode.description: Passing CoT reasoning chains directly to external tools as verified facts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: CoT chains are unverified model-generated text. They may contain confident but incorrect intermediate steps. Downstream tools that act on unvalidated reasoning can compound errors.

failure-mode.description: Applying CoT to simple classification or lookup tasks.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: CoT adds input and output tokens with no accuracy benefit for tasks that require a single-step response. The overhead increases cost and latency without improving quality.

failure-mode.description: Using extended thinking budget_tokens overrun without monitoring cost.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Thinking tokens count toward output tokens and are non-cacheable. A single call with budget_tokens=16000 can cost 5-10x a normal call. Silent budget overruns erode pipeline cost controls.
